title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A video tutorial explaining AWS IAM fundamentals for beginners, covering users, roles, policies, least privilege principle, IAM Access Analyzer, and security best practices. The content uses analogies like bouncers and visitor passes to explain access control concepts.
